title: Food Analysis Bug Fix, Nutrition Breakdown, HealthKit Export & Thumb Calibration

context.description: Continuous glucose monitoring (CGM) app for iOS with DOS amber CGA aesthetic

commits.message: feat(claude): fix food analysis, full nutrition breakdown, HealthKit export
feat(ui): group meal buttons under LOG FOOD label, move insulin right
fix: middleware race condition, automatic signing, bump build 15
feat(ui): combine MANUAL/PHOTO buttons, align with INSULIN
fix(ui): equal width for MANUAL and PHOTO buttons
fix(ui): fixed icon height for consistent button sizing
fix(claude): clear stale food analysis results on dismiss (DMNC-526)
feat(claude,ui): thumb calibration for portion sizing, sensor button layout (DMNC-527, DMNC-456)

milestones.title: Food Analysis Bug Fixed
milestones.description: Middleware race condition fixed — foodAnalysisLoading guard was blocking the API call from ever firing

milestones.title: Full Nutrition Breakdown Shipped
milestones.description: MealEntry expanded with protein/fat/calories/fiber; results view shows full macro breakdown per item with editable fields

milestones.title: HealthKit Nutrition Export
milestones.description: All nutrition data (carbs, protein, fat, calories, fiber) written to Apple Health as separate HKQuantitySamples

milestones.title: Quick Actions UI Redesign
milestones.description: MANUAL and PHOTO buttons combined as a pair, INSULIN on the right, consistent sizing

milestones.title: AI Photo Reset Bug Fixed
milestones.description: Stale foodAnalysisResult cleared on dismiss/save so re-opening shows photo picker instead of old results (DMNC-526)

milestones.title: Thumb Calibration for Portion Sizing
milestones.description: User enters thumb width in mm in AI Settings; Claude prompt includes thumb size context when analyzing food photos with thumb as scale reference (DMNC-527)

milestones.title: Sensor Buttons Side-by-Side
milestones.description: Scan sensor and Disconnect buttons placed side by side in an HStack, Disconnect renamed and placed on right (DMNC-456)
